description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a prominent flat roof that extends beyond the main structure, providing shade and architectural interest. The exterior is finished in a combination of light gray and white, with a wraparound balcony or terrace on the upper level, supported by thick, rectangular columns. The building sits on a light tan, tiled base that mimics a paved or patio area, suggesting integration with an urban or suburban environment. Large, dark-tinted window panels are visible on the longer sides, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall form is geometric, with clean lines and a minimalist approach, lacking ornate details. The structure appears to be a single-story dwelling with an elevated platform and open, accessible outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a wraparound balcony, large window panels, and a minimalist geometric design in gray and white tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the extended flat roof, thick supporting columns, and the wraparound balcony with a clear view of the paved base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular roof overhang, the length of the balcony, and the large window panels beneath the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall with minimal window openings and the continuation of the balcony structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the open balcony, supporting columns, and the integration of the roof and window panels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side window panels
